data.body:
# P0 — Eliminate `normalizeAgentIdentity` calls in the dispatch path

## Why this is P0

This is a direct violation of the canonical agent metadata contract
(rule 8: "Foolery only extracts at lease setup. No other code path
may call the canonical extractor or its provider-specific helpers").

The dispatch path runs every time a beat is taken, every time an
agent is rotated, every time an iteration advances. Each time, it
re-runs `normalizeAgentIdentity` on input that, per the contract,
should already be canonical. Result: drift, inconsistency, and the
exact symptom the user has been complaining about for months.

This blocks the umbrella knot foolery-2e97 from shipping (AC-6 fails
on the self-audit grep until these calls are gone).

## Sites in scope (3, all in `src/lib/terminal-manager-*.ts`)

| File | Line | Pattern |
|---|---|---|
| `src/lib/terminal-manager.ts` | 282 | `agentProvider: normalizeAgentIdentity(agent).provider` |
| `src/lib/terminal-manager-take-agent.ts` | 317 | `normalizeAgentIdentity(claimAgent);` (return value may be unused — investigate) |
| `src/lib/terminal-manager-take-iteration.ts` | 357 | `const normalized = normalizeAgentIdentity({ ... })` |

## The fix

For each site:

1. **Trace the data source.** What `agent` / `claimAgent` is being
   passed in? If it came from settings (registered config) or from
   a knots lease, it is ALREADY canonical and the normalisation
   call is at best wasted, at worst overwriting good data with
   re-derived data.
2. **If input is already canonical**, drop the call and read the
   field directly off the input.
3. **If input is raw** (e.g. coming straight from a CLI argv or env),
   that is the deeper bug — it means dispatch is receiving raw input
   in 2026 even though we have a canonical-extraction contract. Push
   the canonicalisation up to the boundary where the input is created
   (likely `settings-agent-scan` or `settings.ts:232`) and have
   dispatch consume the already-canonical form.

The terminal-manager files have a 500-line cap and 100-line function
cap (CLAUDE.md), so any restructuring must respect that.

## Cross-references

- Parent: foolery-2e97 (canonical agent metadata umbrella)
- Sibling P4: filed alongside this knot, covers settings/hydration sites
- Contract: `docs/knots-agent-identity-contract.md` § "Canonical
  Functions" and § "What Foolery Forbids Itself"
- Related shipped work that landed Wave 2/3:
  - foolery-b7d6 (terminal-store refactor) — already migrated terminal
    runtime state to lease-id reference
  - foolery-8fc3 (drop toActiveAgentInfo) — already removed display
    re-normalisation
- Tag: `agent-normalizer-fucker` — for finding all related knots fast
data.title: P0: Eliminate normalizeAgentIdentity calls in dispatch path (terminal-manager-*)
